title: Velvety Lazy Sunday Oreo Biscuits
description: This earthy and velvety American dish features a keto-friendly version of Oreos poached in a rich cream mixture to create soft, pillowy biscuits that are perfect for lazy Sundays.

ingredients.name: 4 oz (about 5-6 oreos, crushed and slightly softened by hand or in the microwave)

instructions: In a small saucepan, combine heavy cream and softened butter. Stir gently until the butter is fully melted.
Gently fold in crushed Oreos using a spatula or your hands (be careful as they will be hot).
Sprinkle with lemon juice and salt. Mix well to incorporate all ingredients evenly.
Pour mixture into a shallow baking dish, cover loosely with plastic wrap, and let it sit at room temperature for about 15 minutes to infuse flavors.

Preheat oven to 320°F (160°C). Carefully pour the mixture into an oven-safe dish that can fit inside a larger pan for poaching. Place this in another pan with enough hot water to come halfway up the sides of your smaller dish, ensuring it's at least 2 inches deep.
Cover loosely and place in the preheated oven. Bake for about 15 minutes, or until mixture is set but still slightly jiggly in the middle (you can use a toothpick to check).
Remove from heat and let cool before using a spoon or melon baller to transfer each bite-sized 'biscuit' onto a serving plate. Serve immediately as you would with regular Oreos.
Optional: You can also garnish with fresh mint leaves for an extra touch of earthiness.
